metadata.source_note: Official MyTax tariff page retrieved on 1 July 2026 exposes the detailed Brussels road-tax tables. The page text still says tariffs valid from 1 July 2025 through 30 June 2026, but the amount tables include the 1 July 2026 indexed values also published in the Brussels Fiscality 2026 public rate sheets.
metadata.title: MyTax road-tax tariffs retrieved on 1 July 2026
